raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Batseba lohztijahs/ un
paklannijahs preeſch ta Kehni-
na: Un tas Kehnisch fazzija:
Kas tew kait?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch fazzija us to:
Mans Kungś/ tu eſſi tawat Kal-
ponei pee ta KUNGA tawa Dee-
wa ſwehrejs/ teefchain taws
Dehls Salamans buhs par Keh-
nizu pehz mannis/ un tam buhs
us mannu Gohda-Krehflu feh-
deht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet nu reds/ Adonijus irr
Kehnisch tappis/ un tu mans
Kungś Kehnisch to ne finni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch irr Wehrſchus
un barrotus Lohpus/ un dauds A-
wis uppurejs/ un wiﬀus Keh-
niza Dehls aizinajs/ ir to
Preesteri Abjataru/un Joabu to
Karra Leel-Kungu/ bet tawu
Kalpu Salamanu wiꞥſch ne irr
aizinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tu mans Kungś Keh-
nisch/ wiﬀa Israeta Azzis us
tew rauga/ ka tew buhs teem fin-
namu darriht/ kas us to Gohda-
Krehflu manna Kunga ta Keh-
niza pehz winnu fehdehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet kad mans Kungś tas
Kehnisch ar faweem Tehweim
buhs aismidſis/ tad buhſim es
un mans Dehls Salamans par
Grehzineekeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un raugi/ kad winna
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tain Kehninam tappe
fluddinahts un fazzihts: Rangi/
tas Praſweets Nahtans irr ſche.
Un wiꞥſch nahze preeſſch ta Keh-
niza/ un paklannijahs preeſſch ta
Kehnixa ar fawu Waigu pee
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Nahtans fazzija:
Mans Kungś Kehnisch/ eſſi tu
fazzijs : Adonijum buhs pehz
manni par Kehnizu buht/ un
tam buhs us mannu Gohda-
Krehflu fehdeht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch irr ſchodeen no-
gahjs/ un irr Wehrſchus un bar-
rotus Lohpus/ un dauds Awis
uppurejs/ un irr wiﬀus Kehni-
xa Dehls aizinajs/ ir tohs Kara-
ra-Wirfneekus/ un to Preestert
Abjataru. Un raugi/ tee ehd un
dserx winna Preetcha/ un fakka:
Lai dfihwo tas Kehnisch Ado-
nijus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet manni/ kas es taws
Kalps ejimu/ un to Preesteri Za-
datu/ un Benaju Jojada Del-
lu/ un tawu Kalpu Salamanu
ne irr wiꞥſch aizinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irr fchi Leeta no manna
Kunga ta Kehnixa pawehleta/
un tu ne eſſi tawam Kalpam fin-
namu darrijs/ kam btjuś to Goh-
da-Krehflu manna Kunga ta Keh-
niza pehz winna fehdeht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad atbildēja tas Keh-
nisch Dahuids/ un fazzija: At-
zinajeet man Batsebu/ un ta-
nahze preeſſch to Kehninu/ un
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
